ideal_must_detect.matched_text: ADGM Data Export Approval ref DEA-ADGM-5521

must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet — Strategic Acquisition of DesertPortals DIFC Ltd by Navara Fintech Holdings Ltd (ADGM SPV).

Term Sheet — Strategic Acquisition of DesertPortals DIFC Ltd by Navara Fintech Holdings Ltd (ADGM SPV).
Parties: Seller DesertPortals DIFC Ltd (Company No. DIFC-2021-447); Buyer Navara Fintech Holdings Ltd (ADGM CRN ADGM-000771); Seller contact Ms. Layla Barakat, CEO, layla.barakat@desertportals.ae.
Structure and consideration: 100% share purchase; AED 68,000,000 cash at Completion plus AED 12,000,000 earn-out over 18 months against ARR targets.
Regulatory and MNPI: Private issuer; any MNPI is handled under UAE SCA and ADGM/DIFC market abuse rules with clean-team access and maintained insider list.
Conditions precedent: SCA non-objection (if applicable), DIFC Registrar filings, and execution of PDPL-compliant DPA (Schedules 1–3) as set out herein.
Data room: Access limited to clean team; operational KPIs only; customer PII masked; no raw logs or support transcripts containing identifiers will be shared.
PDPL scope: onboarding forms and KYC records may reference Emirates ID and family-origin metadata; the family-origin field is deprecated (not active) and data minimisation applies.
Cross-border transfer: permitted from DIFC to ADGM and the EU only upon documented transfer risk assessment and approved DIFC/ADGM data export mechanisms.
DSAR and erasure status: all outstanding DSARs were completed on 2025-03-31, with erasure confirmations logged; there are no unresolved DSARs as of signing.
Consent withdrawals: two withdrawals (refs CW-112 and CW-113) were actioned with deletion of marketing profiles within 10 days; future withdrawals will trigger erasure in line with PDPL Article 13.
Retention: Seller policy retains onboarding records for 6 years post-termination; Buyer may shorten retention where feasible to meet data minimisation commitments without impairing audit rights.
Pre-completion controls: no live cross-border transfers to the US will occur before Completion; any sandbox testing uses anonymised datasets and does not involve Emirates ID artifacts.
DPA Schedules: Schedule 1 (Processing Summary), Schedule 2 (Sub-processor Register), Schedule 3 (TOMs) are appended; policy-only measures do not imply any ongoing processing expansion.
Licences and identifiers: Seller trade licence TL-DIFC-00987-XY and DIFC commercial licence copies are in the data room; Emirates ID images are redacted and replaced with EID-token placeholders.
Compliance memo: memo dated 2025-05-18 records Transfer Risk Assessment outcome and ADGM Data Export Approval ref DEA-ADGM-5521 for EU-bound analytics processor only.
Privacy contacts: Data Protection Officer Mr. Sami Al Qadir, dpo@desertportals.ae; Buyer compliance: compliance@navarafintech.ae.
This term sheet does not grant access to raw personal data or waive PDPL rights; routine backups remain unaffected and are subject to existing retention li
